title: CS101 - Project 1: Hello World
description: Write a program that prints 'Hello World!' to the console.

title: CS101 - Lab 1: Variables and Data Types
description: Complete the exercises on variables and data types.

title: CS101 - Project 2: Simple Calculator
description: Develop a command-line calculator that supports basic arithmetic operations.

title: CS101 - Quiz 1
description: Online quiz covering topics from weeks 1-3.

title: LA102 - Homework 1: Vector Spaces
description: Exercises on vector spaces and subspaces.

title: LA102 - Quiz 1: Matrices
description: Quiz on matrix operations and properties.

title: LA102 - Project 1: System of Equations
description: Solve a system of linear equations using different methods.

title: LA102 - Homework 2: Eigenvalues and Eigenvectors
description: Problems on calculating eigenvalues and eigenvectors.

title: LA102 - Midterm Exam
description: Midterm examination covering first half of the course.

title: WH103 - Reading Assignment: Ancient Civilizations
description: Read chapters 1-3 and summarize key points.

title: WH103 - Essay 1: Roman Empire
description: Write an essay on the fall of the Roman Empire.

title: WH103 - Presentation: Medieval Europe
description: Prepare a presentation on a topic related to Medieval Europe.

title: WH103 - Research Paper: Renaissance Art
description: Research and write a paper on a significant Renaissance artist or movement.

title: WH103 - Final Exam
description: Comprehensive final exam covering all course material.
